data: {"generalSituation":"An easterly airstream will affect the coast of southern China today. There will be a few showers over the region. Under the persistent influence of troughs of low pressure, the weather will be unsettled over southern China from tomorrow to next Monday. There will be occasional showers and a few squally thunderstorms. With the troughs of low pressure weakening and the anticyclone aloft strengthening, showers will ease off gradually over the coast of southern China in the middle and latter parts of next week. The weather will improve and it will be hot during the day.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260402","week":"Thursday","forecastWind":"Light winds force 2, becoming east to southeast force 4 to 5.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy with a few showers.","forecastMaxtemp":{"value":26,"unit":"C"},"forecastMintemp":{"value":22,"unit":"C"},"forecastMaxrh":{"value":95,"unit":"percent"},"forecastMinrh":{"value":75,"unit":"percent"},"ForecastIcon":62,"PSR":"Medium Low"},{"forecastDate":"20260403","week":"Friday","forecastWind":"South force 4 to 5, occasionally force 6 on high ground.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy with a few showers. Sunny intervals during the day.
